steps.title: Use the conversion factor
steps.content: The question gives $1\text{ meter}=100\text{ centimeters}$. To convert meters to centimeters, multiply by $100$.

steps.title: Convert the length
steps.content:
For $64$ meters:
$$
64\cdot 100=6{,}400
$$
So the equivalent length is $6{,}400$ centimeters.
